messages.message: The ref value 'ref.current' will likely have changed by the time this effect cleanup function runs. If this ref points to a node rendered by React, copy 'ref.current' to a variable inside the effect, and use that variable in the cleanup function.

messages.message: React Hook useLayoutEffect has a missing dependency: 'startAnimation'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

messages.message: React Hook "useEffect" is called conditionally. React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
